nasb.text: When David and his men came to the city, behold, it was burned with fire, and their wives and their sons and their daughters had been taken captive.

esv.text: And when David and his men came to the city, they found it burned with fire, and their wives and sons and daughters taken captive.

cnv.text: 大衛和跟隨他的人到了那城，看見城已經被火燒毀，他們的妻子、兒女都被擄走了，

ccb.text: 大卫和部下来到洗革拉城，看到城被烧毁，妻子儿女都被掳走了，
